content: NSStatusBarButton.contentTintColor is BROKEN on macOS 11+ (shows black regardless of set color — unfixed regression). For red background on the button: use button?.superview?.window?.contentView layer approach: buttonContentView.wantsLayer = true; buttonContentView.layer?.backgroundColor = NSColor.systemRed.withAlphaComponent(0.3).cgColor; buttonContentView.layer?.cornerRadius = 4. Clear with NSColor.clear.cgColor. Alternative (glyph red, not background): use NSImage with non-template rendering and red symbol configuration — this changes glyph color not background.
